title.zh: 智能倉儲稱重管理系統

subtitle.zh: 讓智能秤資料與入出庫流程即時同步
subtitle.en: Synchronize smart-scale data with inbound and outbound workflows

short_desc.zh: 以智能秤、掃描與 ERP / WMS 串接為核心的倉儲稱重方案
short_desc.en: A warehouse weighing solution built around smart scales, scanning, and ERP / WMS integration

title.zh: 車輛過磅智能稱重管理系統

subtitle.zh: 將車輛過磅流程變成可追溯的數據系統
subtitle.en: Turn vehicle weighing into a traceable data workflow

short_desc.zh: 整合車輛過磅終端、車牌辨識、影像與 ERP / 財務系統的智能稱重方案
short_desc.en: An intelligent weighing solution integrating vehicle-weighing terminals, LPR, imaging, and ERP / finance systems
